# BP-161 positive variant: GORM points a test at a production database.
lang: go
file: BP-161-variant-vulnerable_test.go
variant: production-gorm-dsn
---
package dbtest

import (
	"testing"

	"gorm.io/driver/postgres"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func TestStore(t *testing.T) {
	db, err := gorm.Open(postgres.Open("host=orders-prod.internal user=app password=secret dbname=orders"), &gorm.Config{})
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}
	_ = db
}
